executionHistory.evidence: Artifact-only fix: added 10 trace-ID-bearing DoD bullets (SCN-MT-001/002/003/006 in Scope 01; SCN-MT-014/015/016/018/019/020 in Scope 03) to specs/011-maps-connector/scopes.md with raw `go test` output and source-file pointers; inserted Test Plan rows T-3-19/T-3-20/T-3-21 mapping SCN-MT-017/018/019 to internal/connector/maps/patterns_test.go::TestDetermineLinkTypeSpatial/TestImprove_DetermineLinkTypeLocationsFarAway/TestDetermineLinkTypeEmptyRoute at the top of the Scope 03 Test Plan table; appended BUG-011-001 cross-reference section to specs/011-maps-connector/report.md with internal/db/migration_test.go references for SCN-MT-011/013.
